post_copy_actions: Rename directory on disk from openai-agents-sdk to openai-agents during copy.
Update package.json repository to atomicstrata/atomicmemory with directory adapters/openai-agents.
Update package.json homepage and bugs URLs to the monorepo issue tracker.
Confirm @atomicmemory/sdk dependency uses a registry-safe semver range or a workspace: spec that pack rewrites cleanly.
Run npm pack --dry-run --json and reconcile the published file list against this allowlist.
notes: Directory rename normalizes adapter path to match the unscoped package name. Package name @atomicmemory/openai-agents is unchanged.
